privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_amr_power_sim task by confirming the Webots world and 'DELIVERY_AMR' robot parameters are synthetically generated and initialized via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected battery array [1800000.0, 1800000.0, 2000.0], CPU consumption (15.0), and consumption factor (3.5) for both left and right wheel motors exactly match the task description instructions and verifier.py logic. Additionally, I discovered a critical bug in the task's export_result.sh script where the regex `battery\s*\[(.*?)\]` lacks the `re.DOTALL` flag. Because the Webots GUI natively formats MFFloat arrays across multiple lines when saving, this regex will fail to parse the battery values if the agent uses the GUI, falsely penalizing a correct implementation. It only succeeds if the agent modifies the file manually using a text editor to keep the array on a single line.
